name: music-vibe-test
description: Browser-based music persona test deployed at my-music-vibe.com

scripts.test: node tests/p0-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p1-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p2-smoke.test.cjs
scripts.test:syntax: node --check p0-fixes.js && node --check p1-experience.js && node --check p2-analytics.js && node --check p2-operations.js && node --check p2-static.js

author: betelgeuze-kang
